{{Infobox event
| name = Subspace dive
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Subspace dive]] is characterized by a rainbow rush.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Ships can perform a [[Subspace dive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] attempted a [[Subspace dive]] to flee.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
